scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/loadSpec.test.ts tests/spec_enrich.test.ts tests/llm_provider.test.ts tests/llm_json.test.ts tests/contract_views.test.ts tests/plan_schema.test.ts tests/plan_patch.test.ts tests/plan_gate.test.ts tests/tool_output_schema.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/tool_loader.test.ts tests/design_ux.test.ts tests/design_implementation.test.ts tests/design_delivery.test.ts tests/contract_design.test.ts tests/materialize_contract.test.ts tests/materialize_ux.test.ts tests/materialize_implementation.test.ts tests/materialize_delivery.test.ts tests/validate_design.test.ts tests/codegen_from_design.test.ts tests/repair_known_issues.test.ts tests/verify_project.test.ts tests/tool_call_planner.test.ts tests/task_tool_calls_planner.test.ts tests/planner_tool_call_plan.test.ts tests/replanner.test.ts tests/agent_events.test.ts tests/agent_plan_mode.test.ts tests/agent_plan_replan_integration.test.ts tests/agent_runtime.test.ts
scripts.test:stack: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run build
scripts.test:agent-smoke: bash -lc 'test -n "$SPEC_PATH" && test -n "$OUT_DIR" || { echo "Set SPEC_PATH and OUT_DIR, e.g. SPEC_PATH=/path/spec.json OUT_DIR=/path/out"; exit 1; }; pnpm dev -- --agent --goal "Generate and run app from spec" --spec "$SPEC_PATH" --out "$OUT_DIR" --apply --verify --repair'
